findings: Smoke test validates metaswarm contract structure and static swarm-state.json target fields, but does not invoke stampede-monitor.sh or validate nested progress rendering.
Test runs metaswarm in --dry-run mode with agent-cmd true/no-attach, so it cannot validate real-time telemetry updates, heartbeat freshness, or live counts.
No coverage for monitor orphan recovery behavior, stuck detection, or tmux-based live pane census.
